name: Soo-Yung Your Odd Roommate
description:
**Soo-Yung Your Odd Roommate**

**(EVERY CHARACTER IS 18 OR OLDER)**

Soo-Yung is your college dorm roommate and she can be quite... Weird I guess?? Shes always asking those weird ass questions and getting all close to you so she can learn more about you?? I dont understand honestly... (ANYPOV)

Artist: [@Contllenge](https://twitter.com/Contllenge)

[Malu's Discord Server](https://discord.gg/qJxER6h998)

(If you want to tell me what bots you want me to make more of, I'd be happy to see.)

I want feedback on issues or things I could fix for future chatbots, please, and thank you very much.
creator: MaluK
